Title: Shell injection in send action
Description: User input written directly to stdin without escaping special characters
Exploit_Scenario: send action with $(rm -rf /) payload
Recommended_Fix: Escape shell metacharacters or use safer IPC mechanism

Title: Command injection via exec()
Description: awsAuthRefresh command from settings.json executed without sanitization
Exploit_Scenario: Modify settings.json to include command chaining with exfil payload
Recommended_Fix: Whitelist AWS command format and use execFile instead of exec

Title: Arbitrary JavaScript evaluation
Description: browser_evaluate tool allows unrestricted code execution in browser context
Exploit_Scenario: Untrusted source controls expression parameter
Recommended_Fix: Document design intent; ensure only agent-generated expressions used

Title: Unvalidated MCP server headers
Description: HTTP headers from config passed directly to HTTP transport without validation
Exploit_Scenario: CRLF injection via config headers field
Recommended_Fix: Validate header names and values against regex

Title: Missing readline cleanup on process exit
Description: Readline interface never explicitly closed when recognizer process exits
Exploit_Scenario: Long-running voice sessions cause cumulative memory growth
Recommended_Fix: Add rl.close() in exit handler and cleanup function

Title: Unhandled promise in page load
Description: Promise chain created but not awaited; exception in callbacks may go unhandled
Exploit_Scenario: Concurrent page navigations cause cascading promise rejections
Recommended_Fix: Add explicit error handler to promise chain

Title: Unhandled page event listeners
Description: Multiple page event listeners attached but not explicitly cleaned up on session end
Exploit_Scenario: Long session with many page interactions causes listener accumulation
Recommended_Fix: Implement listener deregistration in closeBrowser or add weak references

Title: Environment variable path traversal
Description: PI_CONFIG_DIR can be set to arbitrary path with .. or symlinks
Exploit_Scenario: Set PI_CONFIG_DIR=../../../../etc/passwd to read arbitrary config
Recommended_Fix: Validate config dir is within project or home directory

Title: Massive single file
Description: 2596-line index.ts exceeds recommended single-file size limit
Exploit_Scenario: Difficult to navigate and refactor; increased merge conflict risk
Recommended_Fix: Split into 5-6 modules: orchestration.ts

Title: Large monolithic file
Description: 1105-line telegram relay file mixes concerns: streaming
Exploit_Scenario: formatting
Recommended_Fix: event handling
Impact_High: Complex logic across 1000+ lines reduces testability

Title: gsd path literal in user-facing code
Description: Docstring and code reference .gsd/browser-state which is now .lsd/browser-state
Exploit_Scenario: User sees deprecated .gsd path in help text
Recommended_Fix: Replace all .gsd references with .lsd in code and user docs

Title: gsd path literal in user-facing code
Description: Baseline directory path hardcoded as .gsd/browser-baselines instead of .lsd/browser-baselines
Exploit_Scenario: Visual diff tool stores baselines in deprecated directory
Recommended_Fix: Update path literal and migrate existing baselines

Title: Deprecated path in user instructions
Description: User notification references .gsd/voice-venv instead of .lsd/voice-venv
Exploit_Scenario: Help text directs users to create venv in wrong location
Recommended_Fix: Update notification string and environment paths

Title: GSD_RTK environment variables
Description: All RTK configuration uses GSD_RTK_* env var names; should use LSD_RTK_*
Exploit_Scenario: Users following old docs set GSD_RTK_PATH but code now expects LSD_RTK_PATH
Recommended_Fix: Rename to LSD_RTK_* with backward-compatible fallback to GSD_RTK_*

Title: GSD CLI references
Description: Code falls back to running 'gsd' binary when LSD_BIN_PATH not set
Exploit_Scenario: Auto-memory fails if gsd not in PATH; should prefer lsd
Recommended_Fix: Add LSD_BIN_PATH check first; fall back to lsd then gsd

Title: No max-length check on browser_type text
Description: Very long text parameter could cause performance issues or timeout
Exploit_Scenario: Send 1MB string to browser_type → browser hangs or times out
Recommended_Fix: Add max-length validation: if (params.text.length > 10000) throw Error

Title: Unvalidated CSS selectors
Description: User-provided selectors passed directly to Playwright without syntax validation
Exploit_Scenario: Malformed selector like ">>" causes Playwright error without clear message
Recommended_Fix: Validate selector syntax before passing to DOM API

Title: Missing label validation
Description: Process label parameter is user-controlled and stored in alerts; could contain ANSI codes
Exploit_Scenario: Send label with ANSI codes → terminal rendering corruption in alerts
Recommended_Fix: Sanitize label and strip ANSI codes before storing

Title: Unvalidated memory file paths
Description: No validation of memory file paths before writing consolidation results
Exploit_Scenario: Craft memory paths with .. escapes to write outside memory directory
Recommended_Fix: Validate file paths are within getMemoryDir() using path.resolve() checks

Title: Missing connection cleanup on deactivate
Description: MCP client connections not closed when extension deactivates
Exploit_Scenario: Long session with multiple MCP servers leaves orphan connections
Recommended_Fix: Add pi.onDeactivate hook to call closeAll()

Title: Missing event listener cleanup
Description: Event listeners for Slack/Discord/Telegram adapters never deregistered
Exploit_Scenario: Extended sessions accumulate duplicate listeners
Recommended_Fix: Implement listener deregistration pattern in extension deactivate

Title: Potential race in job eviction and awaiting
Description: Between scheduleEviction and timeout firing job could be awaited
Exploit_Scenario: Timing-dependent job state corruption (unlikely but possible)
Recommended_Fix: Document and test queueMicrotask ordering assumption

Title: Repeated error message pattern
Description: Same try-catch-err pattern appears in 15+ tool handlers
Exploit_Scenario: Maintenance burden if error handling changes
Recommended_Fix: Extract getErrorMessage(err) helper to shared/error-utils.ts

Title: No unit tests for security-critical paths
Description: aws-auth
Exploit_Scenario: bg-shell
Recommended_Fix: mcp-client lack test coverage for injection scenarios
Impact_High: Regressions not caught by test suite
Impact_Medium: Add unit tests for: command validation

Title: Global state management
Description: module-level state exports (processes
Exploit_Scenario: consoleLogs
Recommended_Fix: networkLogs) not encapsulated
Impact_High: Difficult to test and reason about state mutations
Impact_Medium: Refactor state into BrowserToolsState class with accessor methods

Title: 31+ references to GSD in comments and docstrings
Description: Comments still mention GSD workflows; inconsistent with LSD naming
Exploit_Scenario: User confusion when reading code comments and docs
Recommended_Fix: Mass update all GSD → LSD in comments and docstrings

Title: No validation of environment variable names
Description: resolveString() expands ${VAR} but doesn't validate var name format
Exploit_Scenario: Malformed var names like ${..} could cause unexpected behavior
Recommended_Fix: Add regex check: /^\w+$/ for var names before expansion

Title: Incomplete error documentation
Description: Some error paths (e.g.
Exploit_Scenario: spawn failures) not fully documented in tool docs
Recommended_Fix: Users unsure why process fails to start
Impact_High: Add error documentation to tool prompts and help text
